events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1124. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: egg. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes kidney beans. Cooking ability: none. 7 meals/week, zone Bayview-Hunters Point.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: Excluded — prep: requires microwave, client is none-only.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Excluded — prep: requires microwave, client is none-only.

events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/600 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–75) ✓, no egg ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B7.
